old_value: {"id":"smallhold-6d2","title":"Inbound Follow activity + auto-Accept","description":"Handle inbound Follow activities from remote actors targeting local personas. If the target account has is_locked=false, auto-accept: create a followers row and send an Accept{Follow} activity back. If is_locked=true, create a follow_requests row instead. The Accept activity must be delivered to the requester's inbox.","design":"Mastodon sends Follow where object is sometimes a full object, sometimes a URI string — handle both shapes. This is the single most common bug in AP implementations. Accept activity: {type:Accept, actor:{local_actor_uri}, object:{original_follow_activity}}. Enqueue Accept to delivery_queue targeting requester's inbox.","acceptance_criteria":"Remote Mastodon user follows local persona and receives Accept notification within 60s; locked persona creates follow_request row instead; Follow with object as URI string is handled (Mastodon quirk); duplicate Follow is idempotent","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"mark@wolfssl.com","created_at":"2026-04-22T23:59:55Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-04-22T23:59:55Z","metadata":{},"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"","depends_on_id":"smallhold-ryy","type":"relates-to","created_at":"2026-04-22T16:59:57Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
